ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Vita Del Cavalier Giovan Battista Marino
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Descritta dal Cavaliere Francesco Ferrari. All`Illustrissimo Sig. Il Sig. Domenico Molino.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: on pp. 238 239 the author mentions the Oziosi Academy. For another edition of Ferrari`s biography, see Vita del Cavalier Gio. Battista Marini, Venice, 1633 (shelfmark: 1063.i.9.)
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Pro Eminentiss. & Reverendiss. D. D. Cardinali Asculano Episc. Mac. Claudius Angelutius Canon. Teol. Imprimatur Antonius Franciscus Pilicanus Protonot. Apost. Vicarius & Auditor Generalis Eminentiss. Cardinalis Episc. Maceraten. Vidit Hieronymus Spinaccius Philosophus & Sacrae Teologie Doctor & Sancti Officij Revisor. Imprimatur Fr. Ioannes Baptista Talianus Vicarius S. Officij Maceratae
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
